content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Summit Tech Partners
Customer ID: C008
Contract ID: K018
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H1 2024 (January – June 2024)
Meeting Date: July 22, 2024
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Alex Nguyen (CTO), Natalie Brooks (Head of Client Services)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Summit Tech added 5 new managed services clients in H1 2024, bringing their total to 31 clients. Revenue growth continues at 24% year over year. The client services team expanded to 11 staff.

PLATFORM USAGE
30 of 30 licensed users active. Weekly report generation at 118 reports per week. White-label dashboards deployed to all 31 managed services clients. Automated delivery running for 28 of 31 clients.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- SSO shipped in Q2 2024 as committed — Alex Nguyen confirmed both enterprise clients requiring SSO have completed their compliance review and are now fully active. Described SSO delivery as "overdue but appreciated"
- Natalie Brooks reported that InsightIQ is now referenced in Summit Tech's sales materials as a differentiator — two new client wins in Q2 cited the reporting capability as a factor in choosing Summit Tech over competitors
- ARR at renewal was $43,200 — still below the $60K dedicated CSM threshold. James Okafor flagged that the account is projected to cross $60K at the next renewal in May 2025
- Alex Nguyen raised a new request: a client-facing self-serve portal where Summit Tech's enterprise clients could run their own ad hoc reports without involving Summit Tech staff

SATISFACTION RATING: 4.5/5
Alex Nguyen: "SSO is done, finally. The self-serve portal idea is the next thing that would genuinely change how we serve clients."

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to research self-serve client portal feasibility and bring findings to H2 QBR
- Track toward $60K ARR threshold — dedicated CSM assignment expected at May 2025 renewal
- Natalie Brooks to share Summit Tech sales materials referencing InsightIQ for use as a case study reference

NEXT QBR: January 2025
